title: lophophora koehresii
intro: Lophophora koehresii is a species of cactus in the genus Lophophora, specifically a type of peyote that is native to northern Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lophophora koehresii include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Lophophora koehresii often come in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are typically used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
